# Lessons from flight package
Vectors, Factors and Flight

Factor Vectors are an important concept.
Factor levels.
Order of a factor.
Factors seem like objects with properties. A factor has an internal vector c(...) and other meta data such as levels=... and ordered=...
factor(name=c(...), ...=..., )
Only store unique values.

```{r}
factor(x=c('a', 'b', 'c'),
levels=, labels=, exclude=NA, ordered=is.ordered(x),nmax=NA)

```

Create a set of indicator or 'dummy' variables using model.matrix. One colomn for each level of the factor.
```{r}
nf <- factor(c('a', 'b', 'c', 'd', 'e', 'f', 'g', 'h', 'i', 'j'))
model.matrix(~ nf - 1) # with 1 if a row contains that level or 0 otherwise
```
